# AUTO DRIVE UPLOADER - Configuration Example

# This file shows example RClone configuration
# For Termux: ~/.config/rclone/rclone.conf
# For Linux: ~/.config/rclone/rclone.conf

# To set up your configuration, run:
#   rclone config
# Then create a new remote with the following details:
# - Name: google auto photo
# - Type: Google Drive
# - Complete OAuth authentication

# Example structure (DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE):
# [google auto photo]
# type = drive
# token = {...your OAuth token...}
# team_drive =
